snippet.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
snippet.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series delivers even more immersive battle scenes and a more faithful representation of the original manga—bringing an ENHANCED edition to life like never before.

Several years have passed since the fierce battle against Majin Buu, and Earth has finally regained a brief moment of peace. At the same time, Beerus, the God of Destruction, awakens from his long, deep sleep. Even Kai and Supreme Kai, aware of Beerus’s overwhelming power to destroy entire planets, watch his awakening with great fear… Meanwhile, Beerus hears rumors of a Saiyan who defeated Frieza—and suddenly appears before Goku.
Targeted by Beerus, the strongest being in the universe, Earth is in grave danger. Thus begins an Earth-shattering cosmic battle between the God of Destruction and Goku and his allies—a conflict that will shake the entire universe.

Original Work, Story & Character Design: Akira Toriyama

Leak It - Lyrics:
How can I not leak it?
I look so good, you look so good
Maybe we should all leak it together
F**k it
You only live once
Let the people see

Leak it
Too hot to keep it secret
My phone is overheating
Tomorrow, might delete it
But tonight I wanna leak it
I’m feeling so conceited
My body’s undefeated
I’m freaky like this beat is
So what I’m gonna leak it

I’m looking in the mirror
Like who the uhh is this bitch
Oh wait, it’s me, my flash is on you know I’m bout to light it up
All my friends are fine as f**k
POV, no lining up
Numbers keep increasing
Must be looking at my recents

This one’s gonna teach my ex a lesson
This one’s gonna get my boyfriend’s attention
This one’s just for me myself and I
So fire
So how can I not
Leak it

Leak it
They’re clogging up my DMs
I’m breakfast in the bed
2 piecing on these beaches
Up in their algorithm

You know I had to eat down
Fast metabolism
They ain’t gon know what hit ‘em
Tunnel vision
Let ‘em know

This one’s gonna teach my ex a lesson
This one’s gonna get my boyfriend’s attention
This one’s just for me myself and I
So fire so how can I not leak it

You will see all of my body 

Leak it
Too hot to keep it secret
I’m sitting here and thinking
If there’s somebody hot as us in here
We’d like to meet ‘em
Then we could take a photo
Give these hoes some FOMO
Time out for some promo
FLO
Yeah

Leak it
I’m comin’ through your speakers
At night before he sleeping
He on my page and creeping
So MJ about to beat it
To trappin’ thirsty motherfuckers 
I Pledge my allegiance
No photoshop don’t need it
Yeah on God I guarantee it

This one gonna teach my ex a lesson
This one gonna get my boyfriend’s attention
This one’s just for me myself and I
So fire so how can I not
Leak it

#FLO #LeakIt #dance

snippet.title: I Break Game Of Thrones In CK3 with 𝘿𝙀𝙑𝙀𝙇𝙊𝙋𝙀𝙍 𝘼𝙋𝙋𝙍𝙊𝙑𝙀𝘿 𝙈𝙀𝘾𝙃𝘼𝙉𝙄𝘾𝙎
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ASOIAF or Game Of Thrones Mod In Crusader Kings 3! This is the best game of thrones video game ever made and of course its just a free mod that you can download. Now I am of course The Spiffing brit a professional exploiter and breaker of games! My entire goal is to use bugs, glitches, exploits and design flaws to create some absurdly overpowered characters that can breeze through every challenge placed in front of them. Well today I decided to find the greatest of challenges and that comes in the form of the white walkers in game of thrones. Now thanks to some mods we can simulate the arrival of the night king and his absolute destruction of the entire world. Of course to go up against the world ending apocalypse of a threat we have todays hero the single greatest and most overpowered video game character. Reanu Keeves. The perfect being which thanks to some creative exploits we are able to turn into an unstoppable force! After watching all of Dunc And Egg I naturally got very addicted again to this fantasy universe so here we are! So lets find out if Crusader Kings 3 Is A Perfectly Balanced Game With No Exploits Or If the game will still try its best to destroy me!

snippet.title: 100T vs SEN - VCT Americas Stage 1 - Week 2 Day 3
snippet.description:
VCT Americas Stage 1 marks the next step in the race to Champions Shanghai, and the stakes could not be higher. Twelve teams, two groups, and only three spots on the line.

Group Alpha is fueled by one central clash. Brazil versus the Americas. LOUD, MIBR led by Aspas, and FURIA bring regional pride, while Leviatán and Cloud9 look to challenge them. G2 stands in the middle, ready to prove they still belong among the elite.Group Omega is shaped by pressure. NRG stand as the favorites, but KRÜ arrive ready to fight, and Envy reenters the spotlight with legendary names looking to prove they can still compete.

Only 3 teams will reach Masters London. Tune in to find out Americas representatives!

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: ExpressVPN, HP, Pulsar, Red Bull, Samsung, Secretlab, and Verizon.

snippet.title: Céline Dion - Dansons (Vidéo officielle)
snippet.description:
Céline Dion - Dansons (Vidéo officielle)

À propos du réalisateur : « Max Allouche est un jeune auteur et réalisateur de mini-séries sur Instagram qui célèbrent l’amour et les rencontres. Très actif sur les réseaux, il a proposé à différents artistes (chanteur, humoriste, violoniste, danseuse) de participer à ce clip. On peut retrouver la grande danseuse classique Victoria Dauberville et son conjoint Mathieu Forget, la violoniste Esther Abrami, l’humoriste Lola Dubini et la jeune artiste Oria entre autres »
//
About the director: Max Allouche is a young writer and director of mini-series on Instagram that celebrate love and new encounters. Highly active on social media, he invited various artists (a singer, a comedian, a violinist and a dancer) to take part in this music video. Featured artists include the renowned classical dancer Victoria Dauberville and her partner Mathieu Forget, violinist Esther Abrami, comedian Lola Dubini and the young artist Oria, amongst others.”

Max Allouche – https://www.instagram.com/maxallou
Victoria Dauberville - www.youtube.com/@victoriadauberville
Mathieu Forget - www.youtube.com/@Forgetmat
Esther Abrami - www.youtube.com/@estherabrami

Paroles :
Dansons, au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
et les bas fonds quittons
volons, valsons
 
Dansons, quand le monde vacille
sur un pas, sur un fil
à nos corps emmêlés,
nos mains nouées
 
Pour oublier nos peines
Que rien ne nous retienne, (ne nous retienne)
 
Dansons, au-dessus des grands vides
que nos souffles nous guident
les corps à l’unisson
jouez violons
 
Dansons, ce soir il y a bal
au milieu des étoiles,
envers et contre nous
doux rendez-vous
 
Flottons, front contre front
Flocons, sur l’horizon (flocons sur l'horizon)
 
Dansons pour être et rester droits
Parce qu’on se le doit
Pour tous les immobiles
Tous les sans voix ni loi
Parce que c’est inutile
Parce que toi et moi
Nos visages, nos bras
Malgré tout puisqu’on ne peut danser que debout
 
Dansons, inventons nos vertiges
avant que l’on se fige
quand l’univers hostile
une idylle, une île
 
Dansons au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
tournons puisque le monde
ne tourne plus rond

à nos corps emmêlés,
nos mains nouées
 
Pour oublier nos peines
Que rien ne nous retienne, (ne nous retienne)
 
Dansons, au-dessus des grands vides
que nos souffles nous guident
les corps à l’unisson
jouez violons
 
Dansons, ce soir il y a bal
au milieu des étoiles,
envers et contre nous
doux rendez-vous
 
Flottons, front contre front
Flocons, sur l’horizon (flocons sur l'horizon)
 
Dansons pour être et rester droits
Parce qu’on se le doit
Pour tous les immobiles
Tous les sans voix ni loi
Parce que c’est inutile
Parce que toi et moi
Nos visages, nos bras
Malgré tout puisqu’on ne peut danser que debout
 
Dansons, inventons nos vertiges
avant que l’on se fige
quand l’univers hostile
une idylle, une île
 
Dansons au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
tournons puisque le monde
ne tourne plus rond

snippet.title: Tarzan: Live Action - (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Tarzan #ChrisHemsworth #ConceptTrailer

Watch This Tarzan Live Action Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the legendary king of the jungle swung back onto the big screen with Chris Hemsworth embodying the raw power and primal grace of Tarzan? This concept trailer reimagines the classic tale with breathtaking jungle landscapes, visceral action sequences, and a deeply emotional story of a man torn between two worlds. Amanda Seyfried brings new life to Jane Porter while Arnold Schwarzenegger commands the screen in a role that adds unexpected intensity to this wild adventure. Every scene was crafted to honor the timeless legacy while pushing the story into bold new territory.

The storyboard and all visuals in this trailer were personally created by me as a passionate "What If" project exploring a modern Tarzan adaptation. I envisioned Hemsworth channeling the untamed spirit of a man raised among apes, connecting with audiences through both heart and spectacle. From thundering elephant stampedes to intimate moments beneath the jungle canopy, this concept captures the adventure and wonder that made Tarzan an enduring icon. This is my personal love letter to one of fiction's greatest heroes and the incredible cast I dream could bring him to life.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer and a personal "What If" creative project. It is not affiliated with Edgar Rice Burroughs Inc., Warner Bros., Disney, or any official Tarzan production. All storyboard work and visuals were independently created by me for entertainment purposes only.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.
